scripts.dev: npm run dev -w backend & npm run dev -w frontend-v2 & npm run dev -w admin-frontend
scripts.dev:legacy: npm run dev -w backend & npm run dev -w frontend & npm run dev -w admin-frontend
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend-v2 && npm run build -w admin-frontend
scripts.build:legacy: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w admin-frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend && npm run test -w frontend-v2 && npm run test -w admin-frontend
